Maybe Intelligence Ain't All That
AI hit a ceiling not because it lacks intelligence, but because most hard problems require contact with reality, not just better reasoning.
> The takeoff story assumed the limit was thinking. It isn't. The limit is contact with reality.
> A smarter reasoner fills the gaps between known facts in simple areas faster and better, but it doesn't produce new facts.
> Coming up with ideas was never the hard part. The hard part is how fast reality answers them.
Source:
https://x.com/CliffordSosin/status/2078594661359194500?s=20

CRYPTO HACKS HIT ALL-TIME RECORD IN 2026 WITH 145 INCIDENTS BY JULY, DOUBLING AFTER ANTHROPIC’S MYTHOS AI RELEASE
SOURCE

tweet.text:
There have been more crypto hacks in the first 7 months of 2026 than in any full year on record.

145 by 22nd July. The previous annual record was 97.

The pace doubled after April, coinciding with the release of Mythos, which heralded a new generation of frontier models.

Crypto Infrastructure.text:
Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF inflows extend positive streak –
Link
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs logged $68.99 million in net inflows on July 23, led by BlackRock's IBIT with $38.78 million, extending the streak to seven straight days. Ethereum spot ETFs took in $72.64 million, with BlackRock's ETHA posting $53.47 million.
Matters because:
sustained ETF buying can support price stability and may help fuel further altcoin rotation as market confidence improves.

tweet.text: According to SoSoValue, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of USD 68.99 million on July 23, led by BlackRock’s IBIT with USD 38.78 million. Spot Ethereum ETFs drew USD 72.64 million, with BlackRock’s ETHA posting the largest single-day inflow at USD 53.47 million. BlackRock is the world’s largest asset manager and operates the largest U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF by assets.

Dia oracles launches DIA ZK for verifiable off-chain data assurance –
Link
DIA Oracles released DIA ZK, a zero-knowledge proof layer designed to verify off-chain reserves and collateral for yield-bearing stablecoins and tokenized assets without revealing the underlying data. The launch targets disclosure requirements under MiCA in the EU and the GENIUS Act in the US.
Matters because:
it could reduce counterparty risk for DeFi protocols that rely on off-chain strategies.

tweet.text:
Today, we are excited to launch DIA ZK, the verifiable data assurance layer for DeFi, RWAs, and cross-chain applications.

Yield-bearing stablecoins, tokenized treasuries, and vaults built on offchain strategies now hold tens of billions in onchain value. The highest yields among them are earned offchain: basis trades on centralized exchanges, tokenized treasuries, private credit, CeFi lending. While the token lives onchain, the strategy that pays it does not.

That creates a problem for issuers. Holders, risk curators sizing allocations, and lending markets deciding whether to list a token cannot see the custody balances, exchange positions, or loan books behind the yield. They ask for proof, and an issuer-controlled dashboard or a monthly attestation is becoming less convincing as the basis for trust.

In June this year, a yield-bearing stablecoin lost its peg after the third-party service that verified its reserves ended its relationship. A lending market built around the token was

DeFi.text:
SEC commissioner warns crypto vaults and on-chain lending may fall under securities laws –
Link
SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce said crypto asset vaults and on-chain lending strategies may trigger federal securities law compliance depending on how they are structured and operated. She cited vault operators that select yield strategies or manage reallocation, and lending protocol operators that set interest rates or liquidation thresholds.
Matters because:
the statement signals closer SEC scrutiny of yield-bearing DeFi products and could force protocol redesigns.

Prediction Markets.text:
Robinhood Chain surpasses $1B DEX volume in first week, enabling 24/7 tokenized stock trading –
Link
Robinhood launched its Layer 2 on Arbitrum, enabling 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and ETFs for users in over 120 countries. The network exceeded $1 billion in DEX volume within one week.
Matters because:
Strong early volume suggests demand for continuous equity trading infrastructure onchain.

tweet.text:
Ethereum is for shipping.

Here are some of the things the Ethereum ecosystem launched, upgraded, and announced over the past month.

0/ @RobinhoodApp launched Robinhood Chain (@RobinhoodCrypto) on mainnet, an Ethereum Layer 2 built on the @arbitrum stack, enabling 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and ETFs for users in over 120 countries through Robinhood Wallet. The network surpassed $1B in DEX volume in just over a week.

1/ @aztecnetwork achieved Stage 2 rollup decentralization under @l2beat's framework, removing governance control over its core protocol and taking another step toward trust-minimized infrastructure.

2/ @VitalikButerin shared updates to Ethereum's evolving technical roadmap, outlining the next phase of Lean Ethereum and the protocol's long-term direction.

3/ @ethlabs_org launched as a non-profit R&D lab for Ethereum and ETH. Their mission is to make Ethereum the settlement layer of the global economy.

4/ @ethereuminsti launched as an independent non-profit dedicat

Prediction Markets.text:
Citadel Securities invests $400M in
Crypto.com
at $20B valuation –
Link
Citadel Securities invested $400M in
Crypto.com
at a $20B valuation, in the exchange’s first institutional fundraising round since its 2016 founding. The capital will support expansion into tokenized securities, derivatives, and other asset classes.
Matters because:
One of the world’s biggest market makers is betting deeper on crypto infrastructure, even in a weak year for BTC.

tweet.text:
Meet Nick, your trading agent.

Vibe with it: brainstorm, analyze, plan, buy this, sell that, rebalance your portfolio.

Go trader or quant mode: describe the strategy in plain English, Nick writes the Python or TypeScript, builds the workflow, tests it, runs it on a schedule or a signal.

Paper trade first: run strategies in parallel on Nick's virtual exchange, real money only goes to the ones that prove out.

Every platform, every asset: Coinbase, Hyperliquid, Polymarket, Kalshi, Tradexyz, Revolut, Alpaca, OKX, and more like @ProprXYZ. Stocks, commodities, indexes, tokens, create strategies across all of them.

All the data you need, in one place: Dune, Nansen, and DeFiLlama for chain data, Databento and Pyth for pricing.

Nick is onchain too: an agent wallet on ETH, Base, Arbitrum, or Polygon, powered by @SnapshotLabs 

Always non-custodial: Your funds never leave your own exchange or wallet.

Enterprise ready, backed by @galaxyhq 

Start you free trial now: http://getnick.ai

> In this episode, we cover x402 and machine payments, Coinbase for Agents, the facilitator layer, why 402 was the internet's missing error code, financial independence before agent autonomy, and where value accrues as agents become the internet's main users.

tweet.text:
Coinbase's x402: AI Agent Financial Independence, Agent Payments and Autonomy

Shoal Signal with @MurrLincoln, AI Product Manager at @coinbase, hosted by @zaddycoin

We cover x402 and machine payments, Coinbase for Agents, the facilitator layer, why 402 was the internet's missing error code, financial independence before agent autonomy, and where value accrues as agents become the internet's main users.

0:00 Intro and guest background
3:46 What x402 is and error code 402
5:36 The Coinbase stack, buyer and seller
6:43 Coinbase for agents and discovery
8:25 Where the real use cases are
13:47 Prediction markets and specialized agents
16:05 Agent to agent or machine to machine
20:15 Reuse existing rails or rebuild
23:43 Financial independence and the demand gap
27:16 Enterprise adoption of agentic commerce
30:44 Competing with cards and stablecoins
33:08 Other chains and where value accrues
36:12 x402 as a moonshot bet
38:30 Closing alpha and the autograph game

Dia oracles launches DIA ZK for verifiable off-chain data assurance –
Link
DIA Oracles released DIA ZK, a zero-knowledge proof layer designed to verify off-chain reserves and collateral for yield-bearing stablecoins and tokenized assets without revealing the underlying data. The launch targets disclosure requirements under MiCA in the EU and the GENIUS Act in the US.
Matters because:
it could reduce counterparty risk for DeFi protocols that rely on off-chain strategies.

tweet.text:
Today, we are excited to launch DIA ZK, the verifiable data assurance layer for DeFi, RWAs, and cross-chain applications.

Yield-bearing stablecoins, tokenized treasuries, and vaults built on offchain strategies now hold tens of billions in onchain value. The highest yields among them are earned offchain: basis trades on centralized exchanges, tokenized treasuries, private credit, CeFi lending. While the token lives onchain, the strategy that pays it does not.

That creates a problem for issuers. Holders, risk curators sizing allocations, and lending markets deciding whether to list a token cannot see the custody balances, exchange positions, or loan books behind the yield. They ask for proof, and an issuer-controlled dashboard or a monthly attestation is becoming less convincing as the basis for trust.

In June this year, a yield-bearing stablecoin lost its peg after the third-party service that verified its reserves ended its relationship. A lending market built around the token was

Ondo perps launches tokenized stock collateral feature –
Link
Ondo Perps now lets users post tokenized stocks like SPYon and QQQon as collateral for perpetual positions. The update is meant to improve capital efficiency and let traders keep equity exposure while using on-chain derivatives.
Matters because:
it aligns tokenized assets more closely with traditional prime brokerage workflows.

tweet.text:
Tokenized stock collateral is live.

Now available for all users, Ondo Stocks can be deployed as productive collateral backing perps positions, starting with SPYon & QQQon.

Already, trading volume on Ondo Perps has accelerated past $3.8 billion as traders seek:

✅ Seamless hedging on a single platform
✅ Deep market liquidity for equity perps
✅ Tight spreads & minimal slippage
✅ CEX-equivalent speeds
✅ 24/7/365 operations
✅ Up to 20x leverage

Ondo Stocks pioneered tokenized equities. Now Ondo Perps transforms perpetuals trading.

Tokenized stock collateral means traders no longer need to park capital in stablecoins or sell an asset to gain exposure elsewhere. 

This is all part of Ondo’s productive capital thesis that brings capital efficiency and ultimately liquidity for tokenized stocks and equity perps on par with traditional derivatives markets.

Still, the trading and margining infrastructure that now sits on top of tokenized assets is just the beginning of a broader prime broker

Spot Ethereum ETFs drew USD 72.64 million, with BlackRock’s ETHA posting the largest single-day inflow at USD 53.47 million. BlackRock is the world’s largest asset manager and operates the largest U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF by assets.

SEC commissioner warns crypto vaults and on-chain lending may fall under securities laws –
Link
SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce said crypto asset vaults and on-chain lending strategies may trigger federal securities law compliance depending on how they are structured and operated. She cited vault operators that select yield strategies or manage reallocation, and lending protocol operators that set interest rates or liquidation thresholds.
Matters because:
the statement signals closer SEC scrutiny of yield-bearing DeFi products and could force protocol redesigns.

Link
The tokenized stock market cap hit a record $2.3 billion in mid-July, nearly doubling since March. AI and chip-related tokenized stocks rose to 15.5% of market share from 0.3% a year ago, helped by DTCC production transactions, Robinhood Chain, and NYSE/OKX partnerships.

tweet.text:
A lot of motion in this release, so I need a few bullet points:

1. If you used stablecoins for B2B payments before, you probably operated at least three systems at once (a wallet, an on/off-ramp and a bank account).

Reconciling them was always a mess and a giant pain for your accountant. During the last crypto cycle, an entire category of middleware companies emerged to provide a subledger between onchain balances and ERP systems.

With Altitude, you keep your balance in stablecoins, make onchain and bank payments, use cards and bill pay and now sync everything directly into your ERP.

No additional subledger.

2. If you have always operated in fiat, you now have a global business account available in 150+ countries, with access to multiple onchain and bank rails, corporate cards, and a direct ERP integration.

Every transaction is reconciled in one place, whether it happened through fiat, stablecoins, bill pay or a card.

3. Personally, my favorite part. Altitude runs on Solana, so

tweet.text:
Introducing BOOST mode - the new standard launch mechanism for EVERY new pump fun coin

Over $100M in dead liquidity is lost every year when tokens migrate. Now, we’re reinjecting future liquidity into EVERY BONDED COIN.

Learn more 👇

something @VannaCharmer and I have been discussing, and will write about shortly, is how compute derivatives are roughly where credit indices were in 2002.

Back then, JPMorgan had JECI and Morgan Stanley had TRACERS. Each bank built its own credit basket, quoted it to clients, and traded it in large blocks. The demand was real, but liquidity was fragmented across products w different dealers.

CDX gave the market a common basket and a rulebook. Every six months, the index refreshed.

Compute has the same problem, only faster. A three-year H100 contract is tied to hardware that may no longer be the market standard by the time the contract ends.

A rolling compute basket could add B200 capacity as the market shifts and reduce the weight of H100 capacity over time. The basket would survive both chip generations. It would give the market a consistent way to compare them and move from one generation to the next.

Futures or a perp could then trade against that basket. The perp would keep o

The 7 Hires a Hardware Startup Needs to Get Right
> Manufacturing: the talent is in bottling plants & syringe factories, seek analogs, not job titles
> Deployments: hire when you can see ten deployments coming, not after one goes badly
> Supply Chain: the supplier that stops your line is the tier-five one nobody checked
> Finance: your first hire is a controller, not a CFO
> Sales: founders own it until they understand why it works
> Policy: technical enough to understand the product, DC enough to know how to present it
> Marketing: lead with the hard parts, honesty filters out the hires you don't want
Source:
https://x.com/a16z/status/2079233870302724147

tweet.text:
The 7 hires a hardware startup needs to get right:

1. Manufacturing: the talent is in bottling plants and syringe factories, seek analogs instead of job titles

2. Deployments: hire when you can see ten deployments coming, not after one goes badly

3. Supply Chain: the supplier that stops your line is the tier-five one nobody checked

4. Finance: your first hire is a controller, not a CFO

5. Sales: founders own it until they understand why it works

6. Policy: technical enough to understand the product, DC enough to know how to present it

7. Marketing: lead with the hard parts, honesty filters out the hires you don't want

"Get these hires wrong and a remarkable product stalls out. Get them right and the rest of the company compounds."

Full piece from @zabie_e: https://www.a16z.news/p/the-7-hires-a-hardware-startup-needs

Robotics.text:
Vitalik on AI's Rapid Advancement and Its Long-Term Implications for Humanity
“AGI is AI that is powerful enough that if you were to upload it into robot bodies, and all humans suddenly disappeared, it would be able to independently continue civilization.”
> Vitalik defines AGI as AI that could independently continue civilization without humans, a "point of no return" making human dominance a historical contingency rather than a guarantee, and says we don't yet know if LLMs will cover all remaining human capabilities.
> He advocates for slower AI development, open-weight models, and human-AI integration to preserve human agency and prevent concentrated power.
Source:
https://x.com/VitalikButerin/status/2079157844817990035

tweet.text:
Thread: how I think about the growth of AI capabilities and what it means for us as they keep getting stronger.

I think the right model for comparing humans and AI is not any single dimension like intelligence or aggregate performance on economic tasks. Rather, I view both humans and machines as having a whole range of capabilities. This includes both physical (eg. doing things with our hands, walking) and mental (eg. strategic thinking, mental math, emotional intelligence).

For most of human history, machines have only exceeded us in very few areas, eg. a strong early example is water and windmills. So we can look at the situation in 1500 like this:

Security/Exploits.text:
BitMEX Exchange To Shut Down Operations On September 23, 2026
> BitMEX is shutting down on Sept 23, 2026 after 11 years, following a strategic review by owner HDR Global Trading Limited, with all customer funds remaining safe & withdrawable during the transition
Source:
https://x.com/BitMEX/status/2080201602456301580

tweet.text:
Dear BitMEX Users,

Today, we share with a very heavy heart that BitMEX exchange will shut down its operations, effective 23 September 2026 at 04:00:00 UTC.

The owner and operator of BitMEX, HDR Global Trading Limited, has made the difficult decision to close operations following a strategic review of the business.

It may not look the same today, but we are proud of our 11+ year legacy and the role we played in shaping the crypto industry. Dear BitMEX Users,

Today, we share with a very heavy heart that BitMEX exchange will shut down its operations, effective 23 September 2026 at 04:00:00 UTC.

Tokenized stock market reaches $2.3 billion, with AI and chip sectors leading growth –
Link
The tokenized stock market cap hit a record $2.3 billion in mid-July, nearly doubling since March. AI and chip-related tokenized stocks rose to 15.5% of market share from 0.3% a year ago, helped by DTCC production transactions, Robinhood Chain, and NYSE/OKX partnerships.
Matters because:
the growth suggests institutional adoption of on-chain equities is accelerating faster than expected.

Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to fifth consecutive day, totaling $727M –
Link
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs logged $227M in net inflows on July 20, bringing the streak to five straight positive days, the longest since May. The flows came alongside cooling inflation at 3.5% YoY and GDP growth of 2.1% annualized.
Matters because:
sustained ETF demand can support BTC price stability and suggests renewed institutional confidence in risk assets.

tweet.text:
Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20

On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw total net inflows of $38.09 million.

Semiconductors/Compute.text:
White House Accuses China’s Moonshot AI of Distilling Anthropic’s Fable to Develop Kimi K3
> The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy accused China's Moonshot AI of covertly distilling Anthropic's Fable model at scale using a sophisticated platform designed to evade detection, while also acquiring restricted Nvidia GB300 servers to train its K3 model.
Source:
https://x.com/mkratsios47/status/2079933645888880708

tweet.text:
We have information that Moonshot AI distilled Anthropic’s Fable for the development of its K3 model. 

To do this they developed a sophisticated internal platform to conduct large scale distillation against U.S. models, allowing them to quickly switch between multiple methods of access to avoid detection. Moonshot AI has also acquired GB300-equipped servers and has accessed GB300s in Thailand, likely to train its AI models.
 
The United States strongly supports the free and fair development of AI, including a thriving competitive ecosystem that spans frontier models, specialized systems, open-source frameworks, and open-weight models. Legitimate AI distillation used to create smaller, more efficient models plays a vital role in this open innovation ecosystem. However, large-scale, covert industrial distillation aimed at stealing proprietary U.S. technology and undermining American research is unacceptable.

Link
Robinhood launched its Layer 2 on Arbitrum, enabling 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and ETFs for users in over 120 countries. The network exceeded $1 billion in DEX volume within one week.

tweet.text:
Ethereum is for shipping.

Here are some of the things the Ethereum ecosystem launched, upgraded, and announced over the past month.

0/ @RobinhoodApp launched Robinhood Chain (@RobinhoodCrypto) on mainnet, an Ethereum Layer 2 built on the @arbitrum stack, enabling 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and ETFs for users in over 120 countries through Robinhood Wallet. The network surpassed $1B in DEX volume in just over a week.

1/ @aztecnetwork achieved Stage 2 rollup decentralization under @l2beat's framework, removing governance control over its core protocol and taking another step toward trust-minimized infrastructure.

2/ @VitalikButerin shared updates to Ethereum's evolving technical roadmap, outlining the next phase of Lean Ethereum and the protocol's long-term direction.

3/ @ethlabs_org launched as a non-profit R&D lab for Ethereum and ETH. Their mission is to make Ethereum the settlement layer of the global economy.

4/ @ethereuminsti launched as an independent non-profit dedicat
